contextNotes: Design precedence is locked as V4 > V3 > V1 > UI architecture > SSOT/AGENTS.
Use only token-driven styling with Open Sans and strict 4px/8px radii.
No gradients, no glassmorphism, no purple/indigo accents, and no default library aesthetics.
All modules remain manually editable with advisory sequence guidance only.
This wave focuses on foundation and top-level information architecture only.

userStories.title: Foundation Token Conformance Sweep
userStories.description: Normalize shared token/global style usage so every screen inherits the V4 design baseline with no conflicting legacy visual rules.
acceptanceCriteria: All critical V4 tokens exist with exact expected values.
Global layout and typography defaults align with V4 style rules.
No banned visual patterns are introduced.

userStories.title: App Shell and Header Premium Sweep
userStories.description: Refine the global app shell/header, context badge, language control, and launcher interactions so top-level navigation feels enterprise-premium and consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Header remains fixed at 56px with clean hierarchy.
Launcher interaction supports fast keyboard flow and clear focus treatment.
Shell controls follow V4 spacing and border rules.

userStories.title: Routing and IA Integrity Sweep
userStories.description: Ensure route surface and navigation flow match the intended IA with stable redirects and no regressions for legacy entry points.
acceptanceCriteria: Primary IA routes resolve cleanly without dead ends.
Legacy paths continue via intentional redirects.

userStories.title: Company Selector Search-First Sweep
userStories.description: Polish company selector search, suggestions, and list/table hierarchy for premium speed and readability.
acceptanceCriteria: Search suggestions react quickly and are keyboard navigable.
Table/list hierarchy is clear with premium density.
